title: The Road to Sabaody
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Duval, Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody.

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: But she walked on two feet!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Say, could you spare me some cash?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Stop scaring the poor girl!! Get lost!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What is this talking glove thing!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It's super popular back on fishman Island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I wanna be a designer someday, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: So, why can you talk, anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The world runs on it, kid!!

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody.
